summary: Horizontal video, a Fox News split-screen interview with DHS Public Affairs Asst Secretary Tricia McLaughlin, who speaks in support of the removal of an alleged MS-13 member and speaks against media descriptions of him as a 'Maryland father.' It is a talking-head news interview with no music.
notable_text: TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN | DHS PUBLIC AFFAIRS ASST SECRETARY; JUDGE ORDERS RETURN OF MD MAN SENT TO EL SALVADOR; FOX NEWS ALERT
